projectDescription: TrustOS is a standards-based verifiable credential verification platform that enables verifiers across industries to make trust decisions using cryptographically signed credentials, with privacy-preserving selective disclosure and zero-knowledge proofs.
keyFeatures: Standards-based OID4VP and OID4VCI verification flows (QR, direct post, cross-device, USSD)
Policy Engine with per-verifier configurable credential requirements and assurance levels
Selective disclosure via SD-JWT and BBS cryptographic suites
Confidential Compute (blind query) using AWS Nitro Enclaves for privacy-preserving model execution
Trust Registry with issuer trust scoring and scheme-level access control
Bitstring Status List revocation checking with fail-closed cache semantics
Consent Manager with per-presentation and standing consent, holder-revocable at any time
Decision Engine producing Approve/Decline/Review with risk and trust scores
Immutable audit trail with hash-chaining and S3 Object Lock compliance
Credential Marketplace for discoverable credential types and compute templates
Case Management Dashboard for analyst review
Lifecycle monitoring for expiry and revocation with automated re-verification
publicApiSurface: PUT /policies/{id} — create new immutable policy version
GET /marketplace — browse credential types and compute templates
